ads.adCopy:
Concept 1: THE ELEVATOR

Shot 1 — Product flat lay on elevator floor
Dark elevator interior, stainless steel walls and doors visible. Full outfit laid out on the floor. A branded packaging bag placed next to the items. Shot from directly above (bird's eye view). No people. 9:16 vertical.

Shot 2 — Mirror selfie in the same elevator
Same elevator. Person standing, framed full body head to toe in the mirror reflection. Wearing the exact same outfit from shot 1. Phone held up covering the face completely. Other hand relaxed at side. The metallic elevator walls create a natural frame. 9:16 vertical.

Concept 2: THE CAR AT NIGHT

Shot 1 — Product layout on back seat
Dark car interior at night. Black leather back seat. Full outfit laid out across the seat. Branded packaging bag on top. Shot from the open car door looking in. No people. 9:16 vertical.

Shot 2 — Person leaning against the car
Same car, exterior shot at night. Person wearing the full outfit, back towards camera, leaning against the closed car door with arms crossed. No face visible. 9:16 vertical.

Concept 3: THE LAUNDROMAT

Shot 1 — Product on top of washing machine
Laundromat setting, slightly grungy. Outfit laid out on top of a white washing machine. Other washing machines visible in the background, slightly out of focus. Raw, unpolished look. No people. 9:16 vertical.

Shot 2 — Person throwing clothing into the machine
Same laundromat. Person standing in front of an open washing machine, mid-action pushing clothing into the drum. Shot from behind or from the side, framed from shoulders to knees. Hood up. Face not visible. 9:16 vertical.
